All done. Here's a summary of what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** v1 and v5 GIFs were corrupted from a previous generation run — v1 had a decompression bomb error at frame 3 (PIL reported only 7 frames), and v5 had only 2 frames instead of 30. The other GIFs appeared to have correct loop metadata already.

**What was done:**
- All 9 GIFs already had `loop=0` in their generation scripts — the scripts were correct
- Regenerated all 9 GIFs from scratch: gigaclungus.gif, gigaclungus_a.gif, gi...(truncated)
